title: Menu Dark Green Golden Script Scattered
source_attribution: Generic premium menu poster (AI-aided design study)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Golden cursive script display + small golden tracked caps labels
composition_summary: Scattered top-down dishes · thin string connectors
why_good: Dark green bg muito perto de Verde Tejo Só Rio (#6B7F5E ish) — direct palette match
Golden script display sobre dark green = exact Só Rio dourado + tipografia language
Thin connective string-lines entre dishes = inspiration para divisores/connectors melhores que abstract shapes
Scattered top-down plates layout = info-graphic editorial sem grids rigid
Restraint absoluta — 5 plates curados em vez de 9 cluttered
caveats: Texto está garbled (artefacto AI) — usar para COMPOSITION + PALETTE, não para text content
